name: Ordo
author: Dieter Stein (2009)
description: Dieter Stein's 2009 abstract on a 10x8 board. All of your 20 men must stay connected in one group. Men move forward or sideways; a straight line of men (an 'ordo') slides sideways together. Reach the opponent's home row, wipe them out, or split their group beyond repair.
